Inlaid Jade Hoop  
 

Lore Item
Slot: EAR FINGER
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
CHA: +3 HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Illusion High Elf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 1.5) at Level 45
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Inlaid Jade Hoop
Lore Item
Slot: EAR FINGER
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
CHA: +3 HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Illusion High Elf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 1.5) at Level 45
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:240
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 04:49:55
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 25,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45

item worth 240 favor
▲ Page top
Level 45
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2003 at 6:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361962624
3 posts
The first level you can use it is 45, speaking from personal experience. :)

Nathrae
The Rathe
▲ Page top
Useful...
QuoteReply
# May 13 2003 at 1:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Not going to brag about it being mana free, since illusion high elf uses next to no mana anyway, but besides the nice stats, it's an illusion spell that requires no spell slot.

High elf illusion useful to dark elves, for the faction (especially if they're agnostic). It's also useful to erudites and humans for mana free, spell slot free, infravision.

I believe the level to use the effect on this is 40.

Edited, Tue May 13 01:58:30 2003
▲ Page top
Relam of Heros Quest
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2002 at 2:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752611466
Scholar
76 posts
There is an NPC troll in Grobb that talks about a ring that could make him into a high elf. Evidently, he used the illusion to get close to and kill high elves then sell the pies. I wonder if anyone has tried giving the ring to him...

Thunderous Silenc - 50 Bard

__DEL__1591774962392
150 posts
Usable at lvl? Im lvl 33 And its not usable. Any idea?
▲ Page top
RE: ....
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2003 at 5:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Somewhere between 38 and 44, judging from these posts. Anyonwe know more specifically?
▲ Page top
Price...
QuoteReply
# May 03 2002 at 2:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776527158
1 post
I am a lvl 44 chanter on the Vallon Zek server. I was recently given one of these things and while I do find it quite useful, I am wondering if anyone from the VZ server has any input on how much this thing would go for. Thanks much.
▲ Page top
Re: Why enchanter
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2002 at 4:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768284828
1 post
I cant speak for others, but here's why I personnaly use it.

First off, stats are decent, with 3 more cha and 10 more mana than a gold black saphire earring.

Second, I am an erudite enchantress. So I'm blind when its dark. Illusion HE gives infravision. Having to right click an item is faster by far than switching spells to have UV or IV up. Simple as that =)

Tehanu
60 Phantasmist
Officer of the Grey Council
Xev.
▲ Page top
Why Enchanter
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2002 at 2:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778183183
7 posts
Why do enchanters get to use this, they get the spell at such a low lvl, I personally think its stupid to give an Enc any illusion item. The stats arent that good either.

Edited, Fri Apr 26 03:45:36 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Why Enchanter
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2004 at 3:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755732581
View User Forum
30 posts
This is a nice clickie for (non highelf) Enchanters. Toss an aug on this and it becomes a pretty good earring. I just wish they had one with illusion dark elf since I am casting that all the time.

~Karm
▲ Page top
RE: Why Enchanter
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2002 at 4:23 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776013048
View User Forum
263 posts
Kind of like how druids and rangers get Snare clickable items, and clerics get Valor clickable items? Saves a spell slot, bud. Also, if anyone was able to use Illusion items, then enchanters lose one of their class-defining abilities. I can understand Bard- and rogue-usable illusion items (the whole deception thing, you know), but I can accept few (or no) illusion items for other classes.

Not that I don't want a clicky illusion item for my iksar, but hey, thems the breaks.
▲ Page top
Level for effect?
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 9:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246373539
2 posts
Anyone know when this starts working? It was given to my 38 enchanter but right clicking on it gives 'you are not sufficient level to use this item' (even though its a level 8 spell or something).

I'm guessing 45... they like having stuff go off at 45... anyone have any idea?

▲ Page top
Usable by others?
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2002 at 4:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361944559
5 posts
I'm a DE Rogue and I was wondering if I could use the effect of this item by right clicking on an open inventory slot. I know I can't wear it, but I want to know if that means that I can't even right-click for the effect. I'd really like the ability to get into the cities of the "good" races and this would be a lot easier than trying to get a Mask of the Coercer!!

Darkmir Shadewalker
of The Nameless


Edited, Fri Feb 8 15:07:38 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Usable by others?
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246373539
2 posts
The screenshot is pre-luclin etc. My hoop now says 'Effect: Illusion:High Elf (must be equipped)' or something, so no you can't use the illusion since rogues can't wear it.
▲ Page top
Great Earring
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2002 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175330124
8 posts
Yes this is useful by the time you get it, I'm level 52, dark elf, and love this when I go to Firiona Vie or anywhere "good"!

▲ Page top
earring
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175336821
2 posts
What level can the effect be used?
▲ Page top
Not too shabby
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2001 at 1:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749976375
Scholar
37 posts
Two nice little added bonuses on this are:

(a)High elf illusion gives UV, a boon for the night vision challenged edrudite.
(b)Quick cast time make is reasonable 'garbage buff' for fighting those dispelling uberesque MOBs.

35 HPs and Mana are worthwhile too.
▲ Page top
RE: Not too shabby
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 12:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965748058
76 posts
I agree that as an Erudite Enchanter this would rock (despite my sig being druid based, my main is now in fact an Erudite Enchanter) and I am checking it out with the sole intent of going to get one..

However point a isnt quite correct Zarc, illusion high elf gives Infra Vision, not Ultra Vision, still a bodacious assist to an otherwise 'blind' race however.

▲ Page top
Opinions of worth?
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 8:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756870557
View User Forum
37 posts
I won the roll for this in Chardok on Rodcet Nife and am trying to sell it, but don't know what cost to go with.

I see that Mr. Anonymous thinks it could "sell for 10k easy", but I'd like some other opinions. As noted, the stats aren't THAT great, and Illusion: High Elf isn't as useful to a lot of people (Seems a great number of Enchanters ARE High Elves...).

Opinions welcomed. 2k? 4k? 6k? 8k? *shrug*
▲ Page top
I own this
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 5:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Cast time is about 2 seconds, not instant-click.

Excellent item for ear or ring piece, could probably sell for 10k easy.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 10 2001 at 7:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The casting time is instant. If getting chased by guard, HiE it. THey leave you alone.
RE: Good Item
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 11:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245759462
Scholar
308 posts
If a guard is already chasing you, then you're already on his hate list. Simply changing your race won't make him stop chasing you, it will only make your corpse look different when he finally kills you.
▲ Page top
Also a ring
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 8:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
None of the previous posts address what I think is the most interesting feature of this item. The screenshot says it is either ear or finger. Probably will drive the price up some, since its more flexible.
▲ Page top
RE: Also a ring
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 12:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767211061
View User Forum
110 posts
I don't think it'll really drive up the price. You'd be nuts to wear this in a finger slot rather than ear.
▲ Page top
Nice
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342702400
295 posts
Very useful; saves that spell slot. If you happen to be "evil" and in a zone with both "good" and "evil" aligned NPCs you have everything you need not to be KoS right at your fingertips, without using any spell slots.

Also... I dunno how regular this is, but one time with DE illusion on my (good) gnome enchanter I got jumped by a "good" NPC; took illsuion off and the NPC walked away.
▲ Page top
useful?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 3:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767381171
27 posts
I am curious, since i don't play enchanter...is the clickable effect high elf illusion useful by the time you recieve this item?
▲ Page top
RE: useful?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 5:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752145829
Scholar
20 posts
I believe the effect of this item would be most useful for an Enchanter of the Dark Elf persuasion as it would give you a "good" alignment race illusion at a moments notice in case of an emergency. Can't really think of an exact emergency, as of now, but it would still be best for them :)
▲ Page top
RE: useful?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 4:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755048933
Scholar
127 posts
Illusion: High Elf is a level 12 spell (I believe... my lvl 12 Erudite Enchie can cast it, in any case), so no, its not at all high level. However, I would consider this useful for several reasons. The HP/Mana are golden by the time you get this, as most or all Int-Casters will have 200 Int or more easily at this point, and more CHA is always nice for an enchie as well. Also, the spell is not *completely* useless, and it saves you the hassle of having to mem the spell to cast it if you want to use it. I use some pieces of Tolan's on my main, and while the effects on what I have aren't jaw-droppingly astounding, their useful, and they free up room for spells on my side bar.
▲ Page top
RE: useful?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 3:59 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yeah, Illusion: High Elf is a (12)lvl spell. But it is an interesting effect to add to an item that's already nice on it's own. Saves yuh 5 seconds mem time)
▲ Page top
Nice Ear
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 2:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251183731
11 posts
As a 57 chanter, this would quickly be slapped on my ears to replace my gold black sapphire earrings. 2 ac, 10 more hp, and 3 cha to boot. Quite nice for enchanters with 200 int, as every bit of hp and ac helps when we get aggro(and we do), and mana to boot
▲ Page top

Shame it has to be equipped to use the illusion. I always wanted to be a high elf :(
